_meta.method: Binary temperature scaling (Guo et al. 2017), 5-fold CV, scipy.optimize.minimize_scalar over NLL
_meta.validation: 5-fold held-out CV ECE within ±0.005pp of pool ECE → fitted T transfers from this small set; revalidate on full 1,497 baseline once available
literature: Guo et al. 2017 - On Calibration of Modern Neural Networks (introduces temperature scaling)
Eikema & Aziz 2020 - Sampling-Based MBR Decoding for NMT (beam-search bias)
Spagnolo et al. 2025 - Don't Throw Away Your Beams (beam-weighted estimator is biased)

hyp_xseg_merge._note: no overlap in tuning data; T=1 is a placeholder until full-1497 fits a real value
